airtip.note: AirTip lives at /tips within menu-autopilot. Focus reviews on src/app/tips/ and src/lib/tips/

gt-ops.note: Has in-project agents for inventory/trends. Central agents still run here. Marketing managed by Kamal/Charlie — exclude marketing/content agents.

menu-autopilot.note: Shares repo with AirTip. Focus reviews on src/app/(dashboard)/ and src/lib/ (excluding tips/)

glossy-sports.note: Mainline Apps project (Bill 75%, Clay 25%). Lives in mainline-apps monorepo under glossy-sports/ subdir.

mainline-apps.note: Mainline Apps monorepo root. Use for cross-app tasks and repo-level automation.

mainline-dashboard.note: Executive dashboard app in mainline-apps monorepo.

infrastructure.note: Agent infrastructure, orchestrator, sync scripts, agent-learning package.

agents.name: Security Review
agents.description: OWASP top 10, secrets scanning, auth checks, input validation

agents.name: UX & Layout Review
agents.description: Accessibility, responsive design, user flow, visual consistency

agents.name: Bug Hunt Review
agents.description: Edge cases, error handling, race conditions, data integrity

agents.name: Content & Value Review
agents.description: Content quality, value proposition, user-facing copy, feature completeness

agents.name: Polish & Brand Review
agents.description: Brand consistency, visual polish, micro-interactions, attention to detail

agents.name: Performance & Efficiency Review
agents.description: Bundle size, dead code, unused deps, re-render hotspots, query efficiency, asset optimization

agents.name: Tier 2 Rotating Review
agents.description: Cycles through review themes for Tier 2 projects each week

agents.name: Internal Ops & Agent Evaluation
agents.description: Folder hygiene, CLAUDE.md sync, task list dedup, agent performance eval

agents.name: Cross-Project Business Synthesis
agents.description: Weekly cross-project synthesis: work item trends, cost analysis, approval rates, neglected projects. Writes one research_request work item as a weekly briefing.

agents.name: Content Writer
agents.description: Generates SEO blog posts and content. Writes MDX drafts, stores as work items for review.

agents.name: Competitive Intelligence
agents.description: Competitor analysis, market positioning, industry trends, keyword gap analysis

agents.name: Creative Provocateur
agents.description: Generates unconventional, trend-aware marketing and content ideas. Deliberately bold — optimizes for shareability and virality over corporate safety.

agents.name: ASO & Retention Review
agents.description: App Store optimization, retention funnel analysis, social content readiness

agents.name: Marketing Analysis
agents.description: Campaign performance, attribution, content strategy. On-demand — triggered via delegation from other agents.

agents.name: Legal Review
agents.description: Privacy policies, terms of service, compliance review. On-demand — triggered via delegation from other agents.

agents.name: Business Analysis
agents.description: KPIs, revenue analysis, growth projections, cohort analysis. On-demand — triggered via delegation from other agents.

agents.name: Strategic Portfolio Audit
agents.description: Monthly cross-entity portfolio audit: 10-dimension assessment for Mainline Apps, reduced scope for GT/Apolis. Produces tactical work items and strategic escalations.

agents.name: Agent Evaluator
agents.description: Weekly meta-analysis of agent performance: push-harder flags, calibration drift, cost efficiency, coverage gaps, L3+ override patterns.
